description: Modern Web Systems — agency marketing site (Next.js 16, Tailwind 4, motion/react) at modernwebsystems.com

tasks.title: Victor & Ian proposal + Stripe invoice page (/invoices/victor-ian)
tasks.note: Shipped + deployed (c91dd48). Live Stripe invoice MDSEIGCQ-0001 ($2,000 due 2026-06-10) on Modernwebsystems account; page noindexed, not in nav. Key decision: $2,000 one-time build + $100/mo upkeep (Sam confirmed); customer has Sam's email (Stripe requires one for send_invoice — Sam delivers link himself).

features.name: Client proposal/invoice pages
features.what: One-off noindexed proposal pages under /invoices/<client> with hard-coded Stripe hosted-invoice facts in page.tsx (single INVOICE object) and the full design in a sibling 'use client' file
features.how: Pattern reference: src/app/invoices/victor-ian/ — copy the folder for future invoices; fleet imagery via nano-banana into public/invoices/<client>/
features.connections: Reuses ui kit (SectionWrapper, GlowCard, AnimatedHeading, Stagger*), lib/animations variants, Stripe MCP (stripe-modernwebsystems) for invoice creation

decisions.title: Stripe customer email workaround
decisions.decision: Stripe rejects send_invoice invoices for email-less customers; created customer 'Victor & Ian' with sam@ovington.io so Stripe emails route to Sam and he shares the hosted link directly (Sam chose no client email).
decisions.consequence: First customer record cus_Ug4M80pbLl4PLJ is orphaned (no email, no invoice) — harmless; deletable in dashboard.

decisions.title: Page-local design system extensions
decisions.decision: Proposal page keeps ocean-blue palette, wave dividers, icons, and vignettes in-file (no globals.css/Navbar/Footer edits); shared token VALUES referenced via CSS vars, never re-hard-coded.
decisions.consequence: Future invoices copy the folder; globals stay untouched.

openQuestions.question: Repo ZeroPercentSam/mws is PUBLIC — live Stripe hosted-invoice URL + client names/pricing are world-readable in source. Make repo private, or accept exposure?

completed: Live Stripe invoice MDSEIGCQ-0001 created via MCP ($2,000, due 2026-06-10, customer cus_Ug4NvOkhzdr1Io, product prod_Ug4MkQKJR2lFMv, price price_1TgiDoCzuo5EmjWW53SKhOJU)

Built /invoices/victor-ian (page.tsx + proposal-client.tsx) — hero, exec-summary letter, fleet cards w/ nano-banana imagery, animated approval-flow stepper, sitemap showcase (16 pages), 1-week timeline, pricing, glowing Pay Invoice CTA

Full code review (7 angles, motion semantics source-verified) + fixes: per-value transitions, variant-embedded delays, dasharray/pathLength conflict, wave overscan + whileInView gating, CSS-var tokens, printable PDF CSS, single INVOICE config object
sessions.nextStep: Sam: rotate the Stripe restricted key pasted in chat (dashboard.stripe.com/acct_1NZ1pCCzuo5EmjWW/apikeys) and decide Q-001 (repo visibility). Optional: backfill this dashboard via /dashboard-backfill.
